_comment: Copy this to env/prod.json and fill in. Gitignored. Used by `flutter run --dart-define-from-file` and `dart run tool/seed.dart --env ...`.
_seed_only_comment: Fields below are READ ONLY by tool/seed.dart — they are never compiled into the Flutter app (lib/core/env.dart only references SUPABASE_URL + SUPABASE_ANON_KEY).
